The '''Ambush at Thila''' was an event during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. During the Infiltration of [[Kalist VI/Legends|Kalist VI]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agents provided false information regarding a Rebel base on [[Thila/Legends|Thila]] to the Empire. Acting on the information, Base Commander of Kalist VI [[General/Legends|General]] [[Noils]], commissioned [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Kale Roshuir]] to eradicate the 'rebel base' and its occupants.

When the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] arrived at the curiously quiet Rebel base, Captain Roshuir sent [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Clynn]] and his squad into the catacombs that made up the base to investigate. While exploring the tunnels, Clynn and his men tripped one of the many detonators that the Rebels had hidden there, blowing up the entire base—along with the invading Imperial soldiers.
